expectations.evidence: Full Step 1 with 5 numbered assumptions, constraint summary table, and explicit optimization priorities (team autonomy, reliability, dev velocity).
3-phase recommendation: modular monolith first, selective extraction via strangler fig, then evaluate. Clear reasoning tied to the dual problems.
Table explaining why microservices are premature across 5 dimensions (perf, contention, ops cost, data consistency, risk). Discusses what to extract and what not to.
Backend layering diagram, communication patterns table, frontend considerations, data layer strategy with read replicas and Elasticsearch.

Auth (Django middleware, session-based), error handling (standardized format, circuit breakers), caching architecture (4-layer with CDN/Redis/read replicas + specific TTL guidance), config/secrets (env vars, feature flags).
6 prioritized action items, 3 ADRs, 2 Mermaid diagrams (Phase 1 and Phase 2), and handoff notes to 4 specialist skills.
